testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_free

failure.message: Exception: Can't verify page url contains preview, current url: https://test13.evitelabs.com/invitation/0281IIAE4SKDAAGJ2EPRA3E75WX7ZQ/gifting?template=old-jess-joy&event_type=featured&c=featured&previous=featured&page=1&invitation_type=invitation&invitation_type=free&category_id=featured&pos=0&variant=free

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7f0934b74a40> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f09345219d0>
def test_evite_rsvp_free(self, config): """ New Creation Flow with Fabric Templates
Create Event, RSVP guests, Yes, No. Email and/or Phone.
Verify guest in Guest List Verify RSVP in Manage Invitation Dashboard
:param config: :return: """
_test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3])
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav(action="create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(actions=["free"]) evite_event_page = evite_gallery_page.select_random_template()
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time()
if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details")
# Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") > step1_template.select_next(url="preview")
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_free' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f09345219d0> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7f0934521070> evite_event_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_page.EviteEventPage object at 0x7f0934c77ef0> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7f0934523dd0> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7f0934521400> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_free (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f09345216a0> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7f09345215b0> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f09345209b0> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7f09345203e0> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7f0934520470> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7f09345217c0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7f0934b74a40> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f0934520d10> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7f0934521910> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7f0934521ac0> user_email_addr = 'evite-02102026-134558-94-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7f09345200b0>

def log_and_raise_exception(self, message): """ Uses logger to log exception and then raises Exception error :param message: Message to log and raise :return: """ self.logger.exception(message) > raise Exception(message) E Exception: Can't verify page url contains preview, current url: https://test13.evitelabs.com/invitation/0281IIAE4SKDAAGJ2EPRA3E75WX7ZQ/gifting?template=old-jess-joy&event_type=featured&c=featured&previous=featured&page=1&invitation_type=invitation&invitation_type=free&category_id=featured&pos=0&variant=free
